summary: TASK-127: Created comprehensive icon set and visual assets system with 65+ curated SVG icons across 9 categories (navigation, action, node, status, content, layout, communication, workflow, brand). Deliverables: DTCG-compliant design tokens (icons.json), CSS custom properties with dark/light mode support and utility classes (icons-variables.css), Tailwind theme extension (icons-theme.ts), TypeScript icon registry with SVG path data and lookup functions, node-type icon mappings for all agent/task/tool/llm subtypes, and 51 comprehensive tests — all passing.
